headline: Coinbase Receives Conditional Nod To Operate As National Trust Company—CEO Brian Armstrong Says 'We're Not Becoming A Bank'
summary: Coinbase announces conditional OCC approval on Thursday, April 2, to form a federally chartered national trust company, a move poised to strengthen its digital‑asset custody and institutional offerings.

headline: Coinbase Extends DeFi Reach As Valuation Concerns Meet New Use Cases
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has integrated Chainlink's DataLink, making its premium exchange data available directly onchain for DeFi use. The company has also partnered with Better Home & Finance to launch token backed mortgages that allow crypto assets to be used as down payments on Fannie Mae backed loans. These updates arrive while Coinbase Global trades at a share price of $172.99. The stock has seen a 26.9% decline year to date and a 6.6% decline over the past month, and the 3...
